channel.name: Simplicity Labs / AI Coding Tools Compared

channel.subject: Suggestion for your AI coding tools comparison: Ralph Workflow

submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free and open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding that composes planning, implementation, and verification around existing coding agents so longer runs end in something reviewable.

why_this_action: The freshest workflow audit still says the bottleneck is distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion, Codeberg adoption is flat, Apollo is already inside its measurement window, and Reddit is structurally weak. Simplicity Labs has a live AI coding tools comparison page with exactly the right audience and a public contact path, so a Codeberg-primary curator outreach there was the strongest fresh action I could actually execute right now.

measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or inclusion signal arrives by 2026-06-06, retire this target and spend the next fresh-action slot on a different untouched curator or comparison surface instead of re-sending the same pitch.
